zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Kingston於1493年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾潘斯維其可時，她的父親William Kingston17歲，母親Mary Scrope17歲。她於1518年之前與Sir John Saint Lowe在英國英格蘭素瑞金斯頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1557年在英國英格蘭素瑞金斯頓享年64歲。

nameMeanings.name: Kingston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places throughout England called Kingston or Kingstone. Almost all of them derive from Old English cyning, cing ‘king’ (genitive cyninges, cinges) + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some have a different etymology, such as Kingston on Soar in Nottinghamshire, which derives from Old English cyne ‘royal’ + stān ‘stone’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Kingston was born in 1493, in Painswick, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Kingston, was 17 and her mother, Mary Scrope, was 17. She married Sir John Saint Lowe before 1518, in Kingston, Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1557, in Kingston, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64.

Elle a épousé Sir John Saint Lowe avant 1518, à Kingston, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1557, à Kingston, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Kingston(이)가 1493년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 파인스윅에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Kingston(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Scrope(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1518년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 수리 킨그스턴에서 Sir John Saint Lowe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1557년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 킨그스턴에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

Она умерла в 1557 г. в местности кингстон, сурри, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет.
